title: Web App: Skill Demos

use_cases.name: Browse Skill Demo Catalogue
use_cases.description: Visitor accesses the skills index; getSkillDemo(skillId) resolves one of 7 registered demos

use_cases.name: View Responsive Design Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: static — no before/after toggle (hasToggle: false on all tabs)
use_cases.content: Side-by-side HTML snippets showing bad vs good for touch sizing, fixed vs fluid layout, mobile/tablet/desktop adaptation

use_cases.name: View Typography Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: CSS class toggle — beforeClass/afterClass swapped, after: null means no HTML swap
use_cases.content: Generic fonts vs curated pairing; flat sizing vs dramatic scale hierarchy

use_cases.name: View Motion Design Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: Toggle with optional onToggle callback; stagger tab re-clones DOM items to retrigger CSS animation

callbacks.onToggle(viewport, isAfter): Stagger tab: querySelectorAll('.motion-list-item'), clone each item via cloneNode(true) + replaceChild to replay CSS animation

use_cases.name: View Color & Contrast Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: Mixed — first two tabs use CSS class toggle; contrast tab is static (hasToggle: false)
use_cases.content: Clashing vs harmonious palettes; monochrome vs strategic accent; WCAG fail (2.5:1) vs pass (12.6:1)

use_cases.name: View Interaction Design Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: Mixed — states is static; affordances uses CSS class toggle; feedback has live interactive button

callbacks.onAfterRender(): Feedback tab: querySelectorAll('.int-fb-active[data-action=like]'), addEventListener click → classList.toggle('liked'), update label text Liked!/Click to try!

use_cases.name: View Spatial Design Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: Grid tab swaps full before/after HTML; other tabs use CSS class toggle
use_cases.content: Chaotic vs grid alignment; equal weight vs visual priority; cramped vs comfortable spacing

use_cases.name: View UX Writing Demo
use_cases.interaction_mode: Full HTML swap before/after for all tabs
use_cases.content: Technical error vs human guidance; vague labels vs clear actions; blank empty state vs encouraging guidance

interaction_patterns.static_compare: hasToggle: false — single HTML pane showing bad vs good side-by-side
interaction_patterns.html_swap_toggle: after: <html string> — toggle replaces entire viewport innerHTML
interaction_patterns.css_class_toggle: after: null + beforeClass/afterClass — toggle swaps CSS class on wrapper element
interaction_patterns.with_callback_onToggle: Fires after toggle state change; used by motion-design stagger to replay animation
interaction_patterns.with_callback_onAfterRender: Fires after HTML is rendered; used by interaction-design feedback to bind click events

demo_module_structure.shape: ES module default export: { id: string, tabs: Tab[] }
demo_module_structure.tab_shape: { id, label, caption, hasToggle?, before: html, after: html|null, beforeClass?, afterClass?, onToggle?, onAfterRender? }

key_relationships: Each SkillDemo provides 2-3 tabs with before/after comparison content
MotionDesignDemo extends base pattern with onToggle DOM manipulation callback
InteractionDesignDemo extends base pattern with onAfterRender event-binding callback
ResponsiveDesignDemo, ColorAndContrast(contrast tab), InteractionDesign(states tab) use static-only display
important_notes: All demos are pure data modules (no class instances). Rendering/toggling logic lives in the consuming UI. Callbacks (onToggle, onAfterRender) are the only imperative hooks — used when CSS alone cannot drive the interaction. CSS class toggle pattern avoids re-rendering HTML, enabling CSS transitions.
